'''fahaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixekizumab|ixekizumab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixekizumab|ixekizumab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fahaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæhæzæth|fæhæzæth]] || [[word:fæhæzæj|fæhæzæj]] || [[word:fæhæzæsh|fæhæzæsh]] || [[word:fæhæzæ|fæhæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fahahazath|fahahazath]] || [[word:fahahazaj|fahahazaj]] || [[word:fahahazash|fahahazash]] || [[word:fahahaza|fahahaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fahazath|fahazath]] || [[word:fahazaj|fahazaj]] || [[word:fahazash|fahazash]] || [[word:fahaza|fahaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fahafzath|fahafzath]] || [[word:fahafzaj|fahafzaj]] || [[word:fahafzash|fahafzash]] || [[word:fahafzaf|fahafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fahazatha|fahazatha]] || [[word:fahazaja|fahazaja]] || [[word:fahazasha|fahazasha]] || [[word:fahazaka|fahazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fahazath|fahazath]] || [[word:fahazaj|fahazaj]] || [[word:fahazash|fahazash]] || [[word:fahaza|fahaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fahazathal|fahazathal]] || [[word:fahazajal|fahazajal]] || [[word:fahazashal|fahazashal]] || [[word:fahazakal|fahazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fahazathatha|fahazathatha]] || [[word:fahazajaja|fahazajaja]] || [[word:fahazashasha|fahazashasha]] || [[word:fahazaka|fahazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fahazathan|fahazathan]] || [[word:fahazajan|fahazajan]] || [[word:fahazashan|fahazashan]] || [[word:fahazakan|fahazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fahazathaoro|fahazathaoro]] || [[word:fahazajaoro|fahazajaoro]] || [[word:fahazashaoro|fahazashaoro]] || [[word:fahazakaoro|fahazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
